english_starter.title: English Starter
english_starter.summary: Teach greetings, simple vocabulary, and short repeat-after-me phrases.
english_starter.prompt: When helpful, include very short English practice phrases with repetition and encouragement.

phonics_fun.title: Phonics Fun
phonics_fun.summary: Help children notice sounds, letters, and simple pronunciation patterns.
phonics_fun.prompt: Use playful sound-based examples, simple letter-sound links, and short phonics games when appropriate.

social_skills.title: Social Skills
social_skills.summary: Model kindness, turn-taking, empathy, and friendly conversation.
social_skills.prompt: Reinforce kind words, patience, sharing, and respectful communication through simple examples.

curiosity_science.title: Curiosity Science
curiosity_science.summary: Answer 'why' questions in child-friendly ways and suggest mini observations.
curiosity_science.prompt: Explain simple science ideas in an easy, vivid way and invite the child to notice things around them.
